column1: # height = measured water level in mm relative to NAP-2005
# surge_anomaly = yearly average surge in mm normalized by the average surge
# surge = yearly average surge in mm
# from1993 = term to be used in broken linear regression
# from1960_square = term to be used in broken quadratic regression
# offset(surge_anomaly) = surge anomaly in mm used in regression (equals surge_anomaly)
# I(cos(2 * pi * (year - epoch)/(18.613))) = cosine term to estimate nodal tide
# I(sin(2 * pi * (year - epoch)/(18.613))) = sine term to estimate nodal tide
# trend_lwr = lower value of 95% CI for trend_fit
# trend_upr = upper value of 95% CI for trend_fit
# nodal_lwr = lower value of 95% CI for nodal_fit
# nodal_upr = upper value of 95% CI for nodal_fit
# fitted_total = fitted trend + fitted nodal + surge_anomaly + offset

year psmsl_id name height surge_anomaly surge from1993 from1960_square offset(surge_anomaly) "I(year - epoch)" "I(cos(2 * pi * (year - epoch)/(18.613)))" "I(sin(2 * pi * (year - epoch)/(18.613)))" trend_fit trend_se trend_lwr trend_upr nodal_fit nodal_se nodal_lwr nodal_upr offset fitted_total
